title: compressor operation
description: Gas-phase compressor. Given the shaft power and isentropic efficiency, the discharge pressure, discharge temperature and compression ratio follow from the isentropic-then-efficiency energy balance.

W_shaft.title: Shaft power
W_shaft.description: Mechanical power delivered to the gas (positive).

eta.title: Isentropic efficiency
eta.description: Isentropic efficiency w_isentropic / w_real (0 < eta <= 1). Lower eta dissipates more shaft work as heat.
